phases.title: Grooming & Sprint Planning
tasks: Verify that all backlog requirements are clearly defined and complete.
Review UI/UX designs to ensure all defined requirements are visually covered.
Provide constructive feedback on missing requirements, edge cases, or design inconsistencies.
Identify and document both positive (happy path) and negative (error handling) test scenarios.
Draft comprehensive test cases in Squash for all features included in the upcoming sprint.
Analyze the impact of proposed enhancements on existing features and system behavior.
Draft the initial Test Plan and Release Document for production deployment.

phases.title: API Contract Definition
tasks: Verify that proposed API endpoints fulfill all related backlog requirements.
Ensure API contracts clearly define both successful (2xx) and error (4xx, 5xx) responses.
Confirm that API documentation includes accurate request schemas, response schemas, and payload examples.
Collaborate with developers to ensure 'data-testid' attributes are documented for frontend testability.

phases.title: Development
tasks: Create QA subtasks in the project tracker (e.g., Jira) for test case creation and execution.
Finalize step-by-step test cases in Squash based on detailed designs and API contracts.
Monitor development progress to ensure it aligns with the sprint plan and testing schedule.
Continuously analyze user flows to uncover potential edge cases missed during initial planning.
Develop automated API test scripts in Postman based on the finalized API contracts.
Prepare and configure necessary test data for the upcoming QA execution phase.

phases.title: In QA (Testing Phase)
tasks: Confirm that all features are successfully built and deployed to the Development/QA environment.
Validate implemented features against requirements by performing UI, API, and Integration testing.
Execute predefined test cases in Squash and record the results rigorously.
Reject tickets that fail to meet acceptance criteria, providing clear reproduction steps and test evidence.
Log detailed bug reports for any defects discovered outside the current sprint scope.
Conduct preliminary performance testing for backend services and frontend rendering.

phases.title: Production Preparation
tasks: Verify that release candidates are successfully deployed to the Staging or UAT environment.
Execute comprehensive Regression Testing in Staging and update test cases accordingly.
Compile version updates and document all changes cleanly in the Release Notes.
Execute automated Postman API test suites for all features included in the release.
Prepare System Integration Testing (SIT) or User Acceptance Testing (UAT) documentation and secure necessary approvals.
Coordinate with third-party tools or services for in-depth performance and security testing if required.

phases.title: Post-Production (After Release)
tasks: Verify the successful deployment of all features to the Live Production environment.
Conduct post-deployment Smoke Testing to ensure core functionalities are working correctly.
Investigate and attempt to reproduce any user-reported issues or bugs in Production.
Immediately report and track hotfix requests for critical production defects.
Maintain accurate version histories and release notes whenever hotfixes are applied.
Participate in retrospects to evaluate the production release process and identify areas for improvement.
Continuously monitor system error logs and service health metrics.
